mapper.select: SELECT member_id, password, name, email, role, status, department, emp_no, birth_date, phone, position, gender FROM member WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT member_id, name, role, status, department FROM member ORDER BY name
SELECT member_id, name, email, department, birth_date, phone, gender, created_at FROM member WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT m.member_id, m.name, m.email, m.role, m.status, m.department, m.emp_no, m.phone, m.position, m.gender, m.birth_date, m.dept_id, d.dept_name FROM member m LEFT JOIN department d ON m.dept_id = d.dept_id WHERE m.status = 'ACTIVE'
AND (m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.emp_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND m.dept_id = #{deptId}
ORDER BY m.name
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET name = #{name}, email = #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, department = #{department, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, position = #{position, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, role = #{role}, emp_no = #{empNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
